name: Lois' Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple, well drained (4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
FROSTING
8 ounces cream cheese -- softened
4 ounces butter -- softened
2 teaspoons vanilla
1 pound powdered sugar
Walnuts, optional -- chopped
FOR CAKE:
Cream together the oil and brown sugar using an electric mixer or fork. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in cinnamon and baking soda with flour, then add to the oil and sugar mixture.
Fold in grated carrots, crushed pineapple, golden raisins, and walnuts (add desired amounts). Grease two 8-9 inch round cake pans and pour batter evenly into the pans.
Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
FOR FROSTING:
Blend cream cheese and butter together using an electric mixer. Add vanilla and mix well. Gradually add powdered sugar, adjusting sweetness as desired. Toppings can include chopped walnuts sprinkled decoratively on top of the frosting.
